series_metadata.series_description: These records include test reports and test data for evaluations performed in the National Type Evaluation Program (NTEP) lab to certify a scale, scanning device, or measuring device submitted by a private manufacturer. Records are maintained by control number and company name. The NTEP lab verifies that a weighing or measuring device meets uniform national requirements before it is approved to be utilized in the retail marketplace.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Keep 2 years then transfer to the National Council on Weights and Measures (NCWM). ; Paper: Keep 5 years, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
